data.name: Common_ContinueOnError_Description
data.value: Specifies to continue executing the remaining activities even if the current activity failed. Only boolean values are allowed.

data.name: Common_ErrorMsg_ValueNotSupplied
data.value: Value for a required activity argument '{0}' was not supplied.

data.name: Common_TimeoutSeconds_Description
data.value: Specifies the amount of time in seconds to wait for the activity to run before an error is thrown. The default value is 30s.

data.name: Common_UsingOutsideOfScope
data.value: Cannot be used outside of {0} activity.

data.name: GetRangeSize_ColumnCount_Description
data.value: The number of columns in use included in the specified range.

data.name: GetRangeSize_Description
data.value: Returns the bounding dimensions (rows and columns) of the specified range, trimming only trailing empty rows and columns.

data.name: GetRangeSize_Range_Description
data.value: Specifies the range of cells to be read. If this value is not specified, all used cells of the spreadsheet is read. If the value consists of only one cell, all used rows in the spreadsheet are read starting from that cell. (Default: A1)

data.name: GetRangeSize_RowCount_Description
data.value: The number of rows in use included in the specified range.

data.name: GetRangeSize_SheetName_Description
data.value: The name of the worksheet containing the target range.

data.name: ReadCell_CellAddress_Description
data.value: The cell address the value should be read from.

data.name: ReadCell_Description
data.value: Reads a cell value in the specified sheet and cell address.

data.name: ReadCell_Result_Description
data.value: The value read from the cell.

data.name: ReadCell_SheetName_Description
data.value: The sheet containing the cell that will be read from.

data.name: ReadRange_Description
data.value: Reads the value of a range from a spreadsheet as a DataTable. If the range is not specified, all used cells in the spreadsheet are read. If the range is specified as a cell, all used rows starting from that cell is read.

data.name: ReadRange_HasHeaders_Description
data.value: Specifies if the first row in the range should be considered column headers definitions. If set to false, the columns in the DataTable will use the following pattern "Col{number}", e.g.: Col1, Col2, Col3, etc.

data.name: ReadRange_HeaderRows_Description
data.value: Determines the number of rows that composes the header. The values of these rows are concatenated.

data.name: ReadRange_Range_Description
data.value: Specifies the range of cells to be read. If this value is not specified, all used cells of the spreadsheet is read. If the value consists of only one cell, all used rows in the spreadsheet are read starting from that cell. (Default: A1)

data.name: ReadRange_Result_Description
data.value: The output DataTable in which the read data is stored.

data.name: ReadRange_RowsPerRecord_Description
data.value: Determines the number of rows that composes a single record. The row values are concatenated.

data.name: ReadRange_SheetName_Description
data.value: The name of the sheet from the workbook.

data.name: ReadRow_Description
data.value: Reads a row of cells from a worksheet and returns the values as an array.

data.name: ReadRow_SheetName_Description
data.value: Name of the worksheet to read from.

data.name: ReadRow_StartingCell_Description
data.value: Cell address (in range format, e.g.: A1) that defines the row to start reading.

data.name: WorkbookScope_Description
data.value: Opens a workbook and share its instance across the child activities.

data.name: WorkbookScope_Password_Description
data.value: The password required for open the workbook if it is password-protected.

data.name: WorkbookScope_SheetNames_Description
data.value: Returns the list of sheet names contained in the workbook.

data.name: ReadRow_Limit_Description
data.value: Maximum number of cells to read from the row. If left blank, or set to zero or less, all cells are read.

data.name: ReadColumn_Description
data.value: Reads a column of cells from a worksheet and returns the values as an array.

data.name: ReadColumn_Limit_Description
data.value: Maximum number of cells to read from the column. If left blank, or set to zero or less, all cells are read.

data.name: ReadColumn_SheetName_Description
data.value: Name of the worksheet to read from.

data.name: ReadColumn_StartingCell_Description
data.value: Cell address (in range format, e.g.: A1) that defines the column to start reading.

data.name: ReadRow_Result_Description
data.value: Array of values read from the row.

data.name: ReadColumn_Result_Description
data.value: Array of values read from the column.

data.name: SaveWorkbook_Description
data.value: Immediately saves all changes made to the workbook to disk, instead of waiting for the Use Workbook container to save them at the end. Use this activity when the workbook needs to be persisted early for operations outside of the current read/write workflow.

data.name: WriteRange_Description
data.value: Writes a DataTable into an Excel worksheet starting at a specified cell (default A1). If the target sheet does not exist, a new one is created. All existing values in the target range are overwritten.

data.name: WriteRange_SheetName_Description
data.value: Name of the worksheet to write data into.

data.name: WriteRange_AddHeaders_Description
data.value: Indicates if column names are written as headers.

data.name: WriteRange_DataTable_Description
data.value: Source DataTable to write into the worksheet.

data.name: WriteCell_Description
data.value: Writes a single value into a specific cell of an Excel worksheet. If the target sheet does not exist, a new one is created. Any existing value in the specified cell is overwritten.

data.name: WriteCell_SheetName_Description
data.value: Name of the worksheet to write the cell value into. A new sheet is created if it does not exist.

data.name: WriteCell_CellAddress_Description
data.value: Address of the target cell (e.g., A1, B5) where the value will be written.

data.name: WriteCell_Value_Description
data.value: The content to be written into the specified cell. Any existing value in the cell is replaced.

data.name: FindValue_Description
data.value: Searches for a specified value within an Excel worksheet range and returns the cell address, row number, and column number of the first occurrence. Use this activity when you need to locate specific data within a workbook and retrieve its coordinates for further processing.

data.name: FindValue_SheetName_Description
data.value: Name of the worksheet to search for the value. This property is required and the sheet must exist in the workbook.

data.name: FindValue_Range_Description
data.value: Cell range to search within (e.g., "A1:C10"). If not provided, defaults to "A1" which searches the entire worksheet.

data.name: FindValue_Value_Description
data.value: The specific text or numeric value to locate within the worksheet range. This property is required and performs an exact match search.

data.name: FindValue_CellAddress_Description
data.value: Returns the address of the cell containing the value (e.g., "B4").

data.name: FindValue_RowNumber_Description
data.value: Returns the 1-based row number of the cell containing the value (e.g., 4 for cell B4).

data.name: FindValue_ColumnNumber_Description
data.value: Returns the 1-based column number of the cell containing the value (e.g., 2 for cell B4).

data.name: DeleteSheet_Description
data.value: Deletes a specified worksheet from the workbook. Use this activity when you need to remove unwanted sheets from the workbook.

data.name: DeleteSheet_SheetName_Description
data.value: Name of the worksheet to be deleted. This property is required and the sheet must exist in the workbook.

data.name: RenameSheet_Description
data.value: Renames an existing worksheet in the workbook. Use this activity when you need to change the name of a specific sheet.

data.name: RenameSheet_SheetName_Description
data.value: Current name of the worksheet to be renamed. This property is required and the sheet must exist in the workbook.

data.name: RenameSheet_NewSheetName_Description
data.value: New name for the worksheet. This property is required and must be unique within the workbook.

data.name: InsertSheet_Description
data.value: Inserts a new worksheet into the workbook with the specified name and optional position. Use this activity when you need to add a new sheet to the workbook.

data.name: InsertSheet_SheetName_Description
data.value: Name of the new worksheet to be inserted. This property is required and must be unique within the workbook.

data.name: InsertSheet_Position_Description
data.value: Optional index position where the new sheet will be inserted (1-based). If not provided or less than 1, the sheet is added at the end of the workbook.
